children.text: Report on strategies for reducing likelihood of United States nationals being unlawfully or wrongfully detained or taken hostage

children.tail: , the Special Presidential Envoy for Hostage Affairs, in coordination with the Hostage Recovery Fusion Cell, the Hostage Response Group, and relevant agencies, as appropriate, shall submit to the President and Congress a classified report that identifies and recommends options and strategies to reduce the likelihood of United States nationals being unlawfully or wrongfully detained abroad or taken hostage.

children.text: Pub. L. 116–260, div. FF, title III, § 305A
Pub. L. 118–159, div. G, title LXXVII, § 7702
